title: FPSTODOMOON Sodium Edition
description: Are you looking for a potato pc resurrection? Then look no further. No unnecessary extra mods. Just fps boost and some necessary quality of life mods.
body:
## 🚀 FPSTODOMOON: Sodium Edition
Elevate your Minecraft experience to the stratosphere.

Tired of suboptimal performance? FPSTODOMOON is the ultimate, high-octane optimization suite meticulously engineered to eliminate bottlenecks and launch your frame rates to the moon. We don't just add mods; we overhaul the entire engine for a seamless, crystal-clear experience.
### 🛠️ The Optimization Arsenal
**🏎️ The Core Engine**

    Sodium: The crown jewel of the pack. By rewriting the rendering pipeline from the ground up, Sodium eliminates micro-stutters and provides a massive boost to frame rates that vanilla simply cannot match.

    Lithium: A general-purpose optimization tool for the game engine. It refines physics, AI, and block-ticking logic to deliver up to 50% faster tick times, keeping your world running smoothly even under heavy loads.

    C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine): Designed for the modern era. C2ME utilizes multiple CPU cores to parallelize world generation and chunk loading, making exploration fast and stutter-free.

**🛡️ Resource & Memory Management**

    FerriteCore: Memory is precious. FerriteCore swoops in to optimize RAM usage through JVM-level tweaks, making your game run leaner and significantly reducing the risk of "Out of Memory" crashes.

    Dynamic FPS: Intelligent resource allocation. When you're tabbed out or multitasking, Dynamic FPS automatically throttles the frame rate to conserve your system's power for other tasks.

    ImmediatelyFast: Focused on immediate-mode rendering. This mod optimizes the UI and text rendering, ensuring that every menu and interface feels snappy and responsive.

**🔭 Advanced Rendering Logic**

    Entity Culling & More Culling: Why render what’s behind a wall? These mods work in tandem to aggressively skip the rendering of hidden objects and occluded faces, freeing up massive amounts of GPU bandwidth for what actually matters.

    Krypton: A professional-grade networking stack. Krypton streamlines data packets to reduce latency and jitter, ensuring your multiplayer sessions are stable and "rubber-band" free.

    Spark: The ultimate diagnostic tool. If you ever encounter a performance hiccup, Spark acts as your personal detective, profiling CPU and memory usage to help you maintain peak performance.

### 💎 Why It's Different

Unlike bloated modpacks that prioritize quantity, FPSTODOMOON focuses on pure efficiency. Every mod in this list is selected for its compatibility and its ability to contribute to a "zero-lag" environment.

    "Experience Minecraft at its absolute peak performance. Don't just play—ascend."

**_📥 Technical Setup_**

    Download the latest .mrpack file.

    Import into your preferred launcher (Modrinth, Prism, etc.).

    Lift-off: Launch the game and witness the performance leap immediately.

# _Bugs:_

If your system language is not English, or if Java is running with a non-English locale (for example Turkish), Minecraft may crash on startup due to a bug introduced in the latest Sodium update. This happens because Sodium currently does not fully handle locale-specific characters during initialization.

To fix this issue, force Java to use the English (US) locale by adding the following JVM arguments to your launcher: **_-Duser.language=en -Duser.country=US_**
